title: reel:update-relations args
description: Incrementally edit the character-relations graph (scenario.characterRelations) of the active (or specified) scenario, shown in the workbench's Relations panel. Edges are directed (from -> to, label); a bidirectional relationship = two edges so you can describe asymmetry (e.g. 'A 暗恋 B' != 'B 把 A 当哥们'). Endpoints accept a character id, name, OR alias and are auto-resolved to ids (call reel:get-script-meta to see the name<->id map). Prefer upsert/removeIds; never wipes edges you don't touch. Provide at least one of upsert / replace / removeIds.

scenarioId.description: Optional target scenario id. Defaults to the active scenario.

upsert.description: Add or update edges. Match by id; without id, dedupe by (from,to,label).

id.description: Existing edge id to update; omit to create.

from.description: Source character: id, name, or alias.

to.description: Target character: id, name, or alias.

label.description: Relation description, e.g. '父亲' / '前任' / '暗中跟踪'.

note.description: Optional note / how the relationship evolves.

itemHint.description: Optional signature item/prop between the pair (narrative note only).

replace.description: Replace the WHOLE relation graph with these edges (drops anything not listed). Use sparingly.
